channel.title: tml — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by tml (tml).

item.title: CVE-2025-5591 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in Kentico Xperience 13
item.description: Kentico Xperience 13 is vulnerable to a stored cross-site scripting attack via a form component, allowing an attacker to hijack a victim user’s session and perform actions in their security context.

item.title: CVE-2024-12223 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in Nutanix Prism Central
item.description: Prism Central versions prior to 2024.3.1 are vulnerable to a stored cross-site scripting attack via the Events component, allowing an attacker to hijack a victim user’s session and perform actions in their security context.

item.title: CVE-2025-2394 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Disclosure of Alibaba (OSS) Keys In Ecovacs Home Android and iOS Mobile Applications
item.description: Ecovacs Home Android and iOS Mobile Applications up to version 3.3.0 contained embedded access keys and secrets for Alibaba Object Storage Service (OSS), leading to sensitive data disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2024-28097 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored Cross-site Scripting in Calendar functionality in Schoolbox
item.description: Calendar functionality in Schoolbox application before version 23.1.3 is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting allowing authenticated attacker to perform security actions in the context of the affected users.

item.title: CVE-2024-28096 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored Cross-site Scripting in Class functionality in Schoolbox
item.description: Class functionality in Schoolbox application before version 23.1.3 is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting allowing authenticated attacker to perform security actions in the context of the affected users.

item.title: CVE-2024-28095 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored Cross-site Scripting in News functionality in Schoolbox
item.description: News functionality in Schoolbox application before version 23.1.3 is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting allowing authenticated attacker to perform security actions in the context of the affected users.

item.title: CVE-2024-28094 · 8.8 HIGH — Blind SQL Injection in Chat functionality in Schoolbox
item.description: Chat functionality in Schoolbox application before version 23.1.3 is vulnerable to blind SQL Injection enabling the authenticated attackers to read, modify, and delete database records.

item.title: CVE-2023-6451 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Publicly Known Cryptographic Machine Key In Procura Portal Application
item.description: Publicly known cryptographic machine key in AlayaCare's Procura Portal before 9.0.1.2 allows attackers to forge their own authentication cookies and bypass the application's authentication mechanisms.

item.title: CVE-2023-4393 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML and SMTP Injection in LiquidFiles
item.description: HTML and SMTP injections on the registration page of LiquidFiles versions 3.7.13 and below, allow an attacker to perform more advanced phishing attacks against an organization.

item.title: CVE-2023-1356 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-site Scripting In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Reflected cross-site scripting in the StudentSearch component in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows hijacking of a user’s browsing session by attackers who have convinced the said user to click on a malicious link.

item.title: CVE-2023-27262 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetAssignmentsDue method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27260 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetAssignmentsDue method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27261 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the DeleteAssignments method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows deletion of data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27377 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the StudentPopupDetails_EmergencyContactDetails method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction of sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27376 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the StudentPopupDetails_StudentDetails method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction of sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27375 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the StudentPopupDetails_ContactDetails method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction of sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27259 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the GetAssignmentsDue method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction of sensitive student and teacher data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27258 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the GetStudentGroupStudents method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows retrieval of student and teacher data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27257 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the GetActiveToiletPasses method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows retrieval of student information by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27256 · 5.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the GetLogFiles method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows retrieval of sensitive log files by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27255 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the DeleteRoomChanges method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-27254 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetRoomChanges method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26584 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetStudentInconsistencies method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26583 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetCurrentPeriod method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26582 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetExcursionDetails method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26581 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetVisitors method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26580 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated arbitrary file read in the IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.013 allows the retrieval of any file present on the web server by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26579 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the DeleteStaff method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.013 allows deletion of staff information by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26578 · 8.8 HIGH — Arbitrary File Upload to Web Root In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Arbitrary file upload to web root in the IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.013 allows authenticated attackers to upload dangerous files to web root such as ASP or ASPX, gaining command execution on the affected server.

item.title: CVE-2023-26577 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored Cross-site Scripting In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Stored cross-site scripting in the IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows attackers to hijack the browsing session of the logged in user.

item.title: CVE-2023-26576 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the SearchStudentsRFID method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26575 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the SearchStudentsStaff method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction sensitive student and teacher data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26574 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the SearchStudents method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26573 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the SetDB method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows denial of service or theft of database login credentials.

item.title: CVE-2023-26572 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetExcursionList method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26571 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the SetStudentNotes method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows modification of student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26570 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing Authentication In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Missing authentication in the StudentPopupDetails_Timetable method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction sensitive student data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26569 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the StudentPopupDetails_Timetable method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-26568 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SQL Injection In IDAttend’s IDWeb Application
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection in the GetStudentGroupStudents method in IDAttend’s IDWeb application 3.1.052 and earlier allows extraction or modification of all data by unauthenticated attackers.

item.title: CVE-2023-22858 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored cross-site scripting in BlogEngine.NET version 3.3.8.0
item.description: An Improper Access Control vulnerability in BlogEngine.NET 3.3.8.0, allows unauthenticated visitors to access the files of unpublished blogs.

item.title: CVE-2023-22857 · 8.5 HIGH — Stored cross-site scripting in BlogEngine.NET version 3.3.8.0
item.description: A stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in BlogEngine.NET 3.3.8.0, allows injection of arbitrary JavaScript in the security context of a blog visitor through an injection of a malicious payload into a blog post.

item.title: CVE-2023-22856 · 8.5 HIGH — Stored cross-site scripting in BlogEngine.NET version 3.3.8.0
item.description: A stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in BlogEngine.NET 3.3.8.0, allows injection of arbitrary JavaScript in the security context of a blog visitor through an upload of a specially crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2022-39018 · 8.2 HIGH — Broken access controls on PDFtron data in M-Files Hubshare
item.description: Broken access controls on PDFtron data in M-Files Hubshare before 3.3.11.3 allows unauthenticated attackers to access restricted PDF files via a known URL.

item.title: CVE-2022-39019 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Broken access controls on PDFtron WebviewerUI in M-Files Hubshare
item.description: Broken access controls on PDFtron WebviewerUI in M-Files Hubshare before 3.3.11.3 allows unauthenticated attackers to upload malicious files to the application server.

item.title: CVE-2022-40294 · 8.8 HIGH — CSV Injection in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC
item.description: The application was identified to have an CSV injection in data export functionality, allowing for malicious code to be embedded within export data and then triggered in exported data viewers.

item.title: CVE-2022-40290 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected cross-site scripting in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC.
item.description: The application was vulnerable to an unauthenticated Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the barcode generation functionality, allowing attackers to generate an unsafe link that could compromise users.

item.title: CVE-2022-40295 — Authenticated sensitive information disclosure in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC.
item.description: The application was vulnerable to an authenticated information disclosure, allowing administrators to view unsalted user passwords, which could lead to the compromise of plaintext passwords via offline attacks.

item.title: CVE-2022-40287 · 9 CRITICAL — Stored cross-site scripting in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC via user profile data fields.
item.description: The application was found to be vulnerable to an authenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in messaging functionality, leading to privilege escalation or a compromise of a targeted account.

item.title: CVE-2022-40296 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Server-side request forgery (SSRF) in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC.
item.description: The application was vulnerable to a Server-Side Request Forgery attacks, allowing the backend server to interact with unexpected endpoints, potentially including internal and local services, leading to attacks in other downstream systems.

item.title: CVE-2022-40289 · 9 CRITICAL — Stored cross-site scripting in PHP Point of Sale version 19.0, by PHP Point of Sale, LLC via file upload and download functionality.
item.description: The application was vulnerable to an authenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in the upload and download functionality, which could be leveraged to escalate privileges or compromise any accounts they can coerce into observing the targeted file…
